title: Anthropic spend pricing table
userStory: As an operator, I want a static model->price map so that cost_usd is computed correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: New file pwa/src/lib/server/pricing.ts exports a static map model -> { input_per_mtok, output_per_mtok }
Used by the instrument wrapper to compute cost_usd for each tool call's parent chat turn
Documented update process when new models drop
